results.rule_text: 50% participation / 20 kids per class; entry threshold 3 classes
results.notes: Participation 50% ages 0-3; avg 20 per class; minimum entry 3 classes.

results.rule_text: 100% participation / 30 kids per class
results.notes: 0.5 dunam/class; built 130 sqm + yard.

results.rule_text: 100% participation / 27 students per class
results.notes: Model mix example: 1x12, 1x18, 1x24 classes.

results.rule_text: 100% participation / 27 students per class
results.notes: Model mix example: 1x30, 1x36 classes.

results.rule_text: 0-1: 100%; 1-6: 20%; staffing: 1 nurse / (100 infants + 375 toddlers)
results.notes: No dedicated land/build quotas defined in this rule set.

results.rule_text: Avoid dedicated plot; minimum plot 0.5 dunam only if combined
results.notes: Represents a medium clinic (300-500 sqm built).

results.rule_text: 30-40% participation; 300-1,000 regular users
results.notes: Assumes 35% participation for reference sizing.

results.rule_text: 15% participation; 200-250 regular users; 250-300 sqm built
results.notes: Usually avoid dedicated plot; allocate built area within mixed-use facility.
Small center baseline.
Small center baseline.

results.rule_text: One branch per 30k-50k residents; ~320 sqm built
results.notes: Conservative threshold at 50,000 residents.

results.rule_text: <=15k small; 15k-50k medium; >50k large
results.built_expr: 200 if total <= 15000 else (350 if total <= 50000 else 600)
results.land_expr: 1 if total <= 15000 else (1.5 if total <= 50000 else 2.5)
results.notes: Population-threshold based size selection.

results.rule_text: Baseline community policing center
results.notes: No dedicated land for baseline community center.

results.rule_text: Entry threshold: 30,000 residents for small station
results.notes: For this sample, below threshold returns 0.

results.rule_text: 1 field per 20,000 residents; land 10-12 dunam
results.notes: Uses midpoint land value (11 dunam per field).

results.rule_text: 1 pool per 25,000 residents; built 1,000 sqm; land 2-6 dunam
results.notes: Uses midpoint land value (4 dunam per pool).

results.rule_text: 5 sqm per resident; >=80% green
results.notes: Doorstep open space standard.

results.rule_text: 500-5,000 units: 0.3 sqm per resident
results.required_expr: total * 0.3 if housing_units >= 500 and housing_units <= 5000 else 0
results.notes: Allocation based on plan housing-unit size.

results.rule_text: Enrichment programs (gifted center, maritime school, Hila, youth employment, etc.) allocated as part of citywide basket. No direct formula — included in citywide allocation.
results.notes: Included as part of citywide public-space allocation. Services include: Gifted center, maritime education school, Hila, Miftan, Matia, Psagot, agricultural farm. No standalone land quota.

results.rule_text: Welfare basket allocation: 0.025 m²/person as part of citywide allocation. Includes day centers, clubs, sheltered workshops.
results.notes: 0.05 m²/person included in citywide allocation. Services: early childhood center, adult day centers, autism centers, disabled clubs, sheltered workshops. No dedicated land plot.

results.rule_text: 1 community center per ~5,000 regular users (20% participation). 5,000 m² built. 3 dunam land.
results.notes: 20% regular users. 5,000 m² built per center. 3 dunam per center. Sports pool/hall area covered under sports rules.

results.rule_text: 1 court per 4,000 residents. 0.7 dunam per court. Only 50% of demand receives dedicated land allocation.
results.notes: 1 court per 4,000 residents. 0.7 dunam per court (2.8 dunam for cluster of 4). 50% allocation coefficient — remainder sourced from public open space (שצ"פ). Combined only in community center Model 3.

results.rule_text: Derived from school classes: 1 hall per 18 elementary classes + 1 hall per 36 secondary classes. No dedicated land. Combined in school/community center/commercial project.
results.notes: No dedicated land allocation. 550–1,450 m² built per hall (not counted in land quota). Combined in school building, community center, or commercial project. Not classified as public-space allocation.

results.rule_text: 1 station per 150,000 residents. 4,500 m² built (medium/large station). 3 dunam land. Citywide public space.
results.notes: Entry threshold: 150,000 (based on existing city conditions). 4,500 m² built for medium/large station. 3 dunam (high building rights allow smaller plot for large station). Citywide שב"צ. Replaces the smaller community policing center in the original rules.json.

results.rule_text: 2 m² per resident (both existing and new development). Minimum 80% green infrastructure.
results.notes: 2 m²/resident, applies to both existing and new fabric. Minimum 80% green. Can be partially or fully reduced if citywide open-space balance (10 m²/resident) is met. Existing green infrastructure must be preserved.

results.rule_text: New development only: 3 m² per resident. Existing fabric: 0 (no citywide open space allocated). 100% green. Up to completion of 10 m²/resident citywide standard.
results.notes: New development only. 3 m²/resident up to completion of 10 m²/resident citywide target. 100% green infrastructure. Search area: entire municipal boundary (can include land outside city per guidelines).
